## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 sentences.

## Affected Surfaces

- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Scripts
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Packaging

## Profiles Affected

- [ ] generic
- [ ] talkstore compatibility
- [ ] aci
- [ ] other or mixed profile path

## Migration Impact

Describe any migration effect, compatibility alias changes, or operator action required.
If there is no migration impact, say `None`.

## Validation Performed

List the commands, manual checks, or environment coverage used to validate this change.
If validation was intentionally skipped, explain why.

## Rollback Considerations

Describe how to revert or contain the change if it causes issues.
If no special rollback work is needed, say `Standard revert`.

## Release Notes

State whether a release note was added or why one is not needed.
